name: get_chat_export_manifest
description:
Get a structured manifest for a HeroUI AI Chat export.
Use this when the user asks to bring a generated HeroUI chat UI into their local project.
Returns the latest successful committed sandbox snapshot by default, including commitSha, file metadata, recommendedPaths, previewUrl, and agent instructions.
After reading the manifest, call get_chat_export_files with commitSha and selected paths.

chatId.description: HeroUI AI Chat id to export.

commitSha.description: Optional commit SHA from a previous manifest response.
